prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial opens on a dark, low-contrast screen containing several lines of small, pale text that are not legible in the sampled frame. A red heart-shaped logo/bug appears in the lower-right corner.

It then cuts to a brightly lit classroom. Several children are positioned among school desks, lockers, papers, and bulletin-board materials. A boy stands in the center foreground wearing loose casual clothing and a dark top, with other children seated or half-standing around him. Their arms and open mouths suggest energetic movement or performance, though the exact action cannot be determined from the still frame.

The next classroom shot is from a lower angle between rows of desks under long fluorescent ceiling lights. Two children stand near the front: one on the left in a light long-sleeved top and cap, and one on the right wearing an orange cap, dark shirt, shorts, and tall socks. They appear to be moving or posing as part of a dance-like sequence.

The scene then shifts to the front of a classroom with a chalkboard behind a boy wearing a white cap and layered casual clothing. A television set on a stand is beside him. On the TV screen is an animated or puppet-like character wearing a cap and headphones, shown in a purple-toned studio-like setting. Chalk writing is visible on the board but not clearly readable.

A close-up follows of a child’s torso in a dark denim jacket over a red shirt. The frame emphasizes clothing and body movement; the person’s face is not visible.

The commercial returns to the classroom. A boy stands forward between desks, wearing a light patterned shirt over a yellow top. Other children sit behind him at desks, including a girl in pink on the left and a boy in a cap on the right. The central boy’s posture and the classmates’ raised hands suggest coordinated movement or a call-and-response style visual moment.

Next is a close-up of the animated/puppet DJ character. The character wears a dark cap and headphones and is positioned over a turntable, with large speaker graphics or speakers in the background. One hand is near the record, visually suggesting DJ scratching or mixing.

The final shots move to a clean studio-like space with a white wall crossed by a wide horizontal red stripe. A child in an orange shirt and jeans stands in a wide stance, dancing. Black lowercase text appears on the left side of the frame reading “letitout.” In the last frame, the dancer bends forward with one leg lifted back in a dynamic move, while the “letitout” text remains visible. The red heart-shaped logo/bug remains in the lower-right corner.
